evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Du implementierst Qualitätsprüfungen, Tests und Monitoring entlang der gesamten Pipeline – proaktiv, nicht reaktiv.
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: The JD balances quality/testing/governance language (Qualitätsprüfungen, Tests, Datenqualität) with delivery/ownership framing (eigenverantwortlich, kreative Lösungen), landing on mixed.
evidence.domain_risk: Bei sicherheitsrelevanten Themen entscheidest du eigenständig, weil du den größeren Sachverstand mitbringst.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: The employer operates in real estate valuation for FinTech/PropTech/InsurTech, a business-decision context with security-relevant topics mentioned but no explicit regulatory/audit framing for the AE role itself, so moderate applies.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Du betreibst und stabilisierst unsere bestehenden ELT-Pipelines auf Basis von Snowflake, dbt und Airflow
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: The JD describes an existing, named tool stack (Snowflake, dbt, Airflow, Power BI) that the candidate operates and extends, indicating an established stack actively growing rather than a first build.
evidence.jd_authorship: Du betreibst und stabilisierst unsere bestehenden ELT-Pipelines auf Basis von Snowflake, dbt und Airflow
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: The JD names specific tools and technical scope (Snowflake, dbt, Airflow, SharePoint integration) a hiring manager would know, mixed with generic culture copy at the end.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Du nimmst Anforderungen von Stakeholdern auf, übersetzt sie technisch sauber und erklärst komplexe Zusammenhänge verständlich.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Stakeholders are referenced generically as "Fachbereiche" (business departments) without naming a specific commercial, product, or finance function, so mixed applies.
evidence.autonomy_level: Du betreibst und stabilisierst unsere bestehenden ELT-Pipelines... Du nimmst Anforderungen von Stakeholdern auf, übersetzt sie technisch sauber.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The bulk of responsibilities are delivery-scoped (operating pipelines, building dashboards to stakeholder requirements); the escalation-level authority on security topics is a secondary, narrower carve-out rather than the role's primary orientation, so execution dominates.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Du betreibst und stabilisierst unsere bestehenden ELT-Pipelines auf Basis von Snowflake, dbt und Airflow
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The candidate operates and stabilizes existing pipelines and integrates new data sources into an established platform, an extend/fix framing rather than building from scratch.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No AI/ML tooling or skill is mentioned anywhere in the JD.
evidence.testing_framing: Du implementierst Qualitätsprüfungen, Tests und Monitoring entlang der gesamten Pipeline – proaktiv, nicht reaktiv.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Candidate directly implements and owns quality checks and testing across the pipeline, described with an ownership verb.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Datenqualität ist für dich kein Randthema, sondern zentraler Bestandteil guter Analytics.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Reliability and proactive anomaly detection are emphasized but framed as pipeline/operational concerns, not compliance or stakeholder-trust risk.
